digital_art.description: Generate images via ComfyUI, sell as digital downloads
digital_art.notes: Start here. Lowest barrier. Proof of concept path.

writing_service.description: Research and draft content for businesses
writing_service.notes: James delivers, Hayeong does research and drafts.

prompt_packs.description: Curated prompt collections for ComfyUI, Midjourney, etc.
prompt_packs.notes: Low production cost, decent niche demand.

live2d_models.description: VTuber model creation and rigging as commissions or pre-made sales
live2d_models.capability_required: Live2D rigging knowledge — James learns, teaches Hayeong
live2d_models.notes: High value per unit ($200-2000+ per commission). Real market.

app_development.description: Build and ship apps to app stores with AI agent assistance

coding_service.description: Technical development projects with agent collaboration

ai_agent_service.description: Build, package, and sell custom autonomous AI agents

platform_notes.Etsy: Good reach, 10-15% fees, saturation risk, don't depend on solely
platform_notes.Gumroad: Lower fees, less built-in traffic, good for direct audience
platform_notes.Creative Market: Design-focused, higher quality bar, better margins
platform_notes.Patreon: Recurring revenue, community building, works alongside other platforms
platform_notes.Direct storefront: Long-term goal — own the relationship with buyers
